description: Enable admins to manage workspace membership.

userStories.title: Add membership and audit event storage
userStories.description: As a system, I want membership state and audit event persistence so admin actions are tracked.
acceptanceCriteria: Membership role and audit event persistence available for workspace membership operations.
Audit event persistence stores actor, action type, target member, and timestamp.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add member invite flow by email
userStories.description: As an admin, I want invite members by email so I can grant workspace access.
acceptanceCriteria: Invite action accepts email and role and creates pending membership invite.
Invite action records corresponding audit event.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add member role change action
userStories.description: As an admin, I want change member role between viewer, editor, and admin so permissions stay correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Role change action validates target role and updates stored membership role.
Role change action records audit event with previous and new roles.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add workspace access revoke action
userStories.description: As an admin, I want revoke workspace access so removed members can no longer access workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Revoke action removes or deactivates membership for target user.
Revoke action records audit event for revocation action.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show recent membership changes in settings page
userStories.description: As an admin, I want review recent membership changes in workspace settings page so I can audit access history.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page shows recent membership audit entries with action, actor, target, and timestamp.
Audit list includes invite, role change, and revoke events.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
